title: HTML Paragraphs
content:
### HTML Paragraphs The `

` tag defines a paragraph. --- ### Basic Paragraph ```html

This is a paragraph of text.

This is another paragraph.

``` Browsers automatically add space (margin) before and after paragraphs. --- ### Line Breaks Use `
` (void element) to break a line within a paragraph: ```html

This is line 1
This is line 2

``` --- ### Preformatted Text The `
` tag preserves spaces and line breaks:

```html

  Line 1
    Indented line 2
  Line 3


```

---

### Display Rules

| HTML Code | How It Displays |
|-----------|----------------|
| Multiple spaces | Collapsed into one |
| New lines in code | Ignored (need `
`) |
| Extra empty lines | Ignored |

```html

This    has   many   spaces


```

---

### Horizontal Rules

The `
` tag creates a thematic break (horizontal line):

```html

Section 1


Some content




Section 2


More content

```

> **Best Practice:** Use `
` for text paragraphs. Use `
` for line breaks within a paragraph. Use `
` for code or formatted text.
codeExample:
This is a paragraph.

This is another paragraph with a
line break.

  This text
    preserves
  spaces and line breaks

After the horizontal rule.

quiz.question: Which tag creates a line break?
